name: The Hat

sheet.name: The Hat
sheet.background_story:
Once a collector of oddities and trinkets, this merchant found themself in posession of a peculiar hat that silently beckoned them.

After putting the hat on, they found themself completely unable to remove it and began to hear a strange second voice in their mind.

It told them to do things and upon following the instructions, the merchant found themself accumulating great power and riches.

description:
